title: Publish the ever-improving cited synthesis + coverage dashboard (CC-BY) with re-derivation guide
context: The whole engine exists to publish an honest, fully-cited synthesis plus a public coverage ledger - never a premature final answer. This M4 writing task publishes the synthesis and coverage dashboard as CC-BY-4.0 artifacts with full provenance and a re-derivation guide, asserting no final answer (frontier published non-empty), with any HIGH-tier surface carrying 'not advice' + recorded expert sign-off or withheld. No credentialed expert reviewer is yet secured for HIGH surfaces.
objective: Publish the ever-improving cited synthesis and coverage dashboard as CC-BY-4.0 artifacts with full provenance and a re-derivation guide, asserting no final answer (frontier published non-empty), with HIGH-tier (health/legal/safety/financial) surfaces carrying 'not advice' + recorded expert sign-off or withheld.
acceptanceCriteria: Publishes the cited synthesis + coverage ledger as CC-BY-4.0 artifacts with full provenance and the re-derivation guide; no final answer is asserted (frontier published non-empty)
Any HIGH-tier (health/legal/safety/financial) surface present carries 'not advice' + recorded expert sign-off, or is withheld
Reviewed and signed off by the maintainer + expert (for HIGH surfaces) (recorded)
output: docs/synthesis/ (CC-BY synthesis + coverage dashboard + re-derivation guide)
